standard: Scopus Q1 Systematic Review — 26-category analysis framework (A–Z)
note: Each analysis is an Ollama-draftable task. Status: done | partial | pending | data-needed. Drafts land in .loop/review_analyses/<id>/ for operator review (§50.5 — never auto-applied). Real numbers only (§57.7); bibliometric needs metadata extracted from the 50 reference PDFs first.

categories.title: Literature Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Given extracted paper metadata (title/year/authors/venue), draft Python to compute publication-year trend, country/author/journal frequency, keyword co-occurrence; output JSON + matplotlib plots.

categories.title: Paper Quality Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a per-paper quality-appraisal rubric (ROBIS/AMSTAR-style) as a CSV schema + scoring script.

categories.title: Dataset Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a dataset comparison table generator (sampling freq, channels, subjects, imbalance) from a datasets.csv.

categories.title: Feature Engineering Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Extend feats_channel with entropy + connectivity (coherence/PLV) + wavelet features; keep leakage-safe.

categories.title: Signal Processing Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft preprocessing_full.py adding notch + re-reference + ICA + STFT spectrogram + CWT scalogram on real EDF; save before/after plots.

categories.title: Machine Learning Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add LightGBM + LogisticRegression + kNN + DecisionTree to multi_model_comparison.py; log training time + model size per model.

categories.title: Deep Learning Analysis
categories.data_source: raw epochs (channel×time) — needs spectrogram path; PyTorch+CUDA available
categories.ollama_task: Draft a PyTorch EEGNet + 1D-CNN trained on raw CHB-MIT epochs under LOSO; report accuracy + params + train time.

categories.title: Transformer Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a small EEG Time-Series Transformer (PyTorch) on epoched sequences; LOSO eval.

categories.title: Foundation/Generative AI Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a RAG-over-epilepsy-papers prototype (chunk 50 PDFs, embed, retrieve, cite) + RAGAS gate.

categories.title: Explainable AI Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add LIME + counterfactual explanations to the XAI module.

categories.title: Computer Vision Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a CNN classifier on spectrogram images of EEG epochs; LOSO eval.

categories.title: Multimodal AI Analysis
categories.data_source: EEG only on disk; others need data (§163 permission)
categories.ollama_task: Draft a fusion-architecture survey table (early/late/hybrid fusion) for the review text.

categories.title: Wearable/Remote Monitoring Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a wearable-EEG comparison table (device, channels, battery, latency) from the literature.

categories.title: Classification Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add subject-dependent (within-subject CV) comparison to contrast with LOSO.

categories.title: Prediction Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a preictal-vs-interictal prediction setup from CHB-MIT seizure onset times.

categories.title: Detection Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add spike-detection sub-analysis (template matching) as a comparison.

categories.title: Statistical Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a meta-analysis forest-plot generator (effect size + I²) if reported accuracies are extracted from the 50 papers.

categories.title: Performance Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add PR-AUC + Cohen's kappa to the metrics suite (MCC/kappa already present).

categories.title: Computational Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Add timing + memory + (for DL) FLOPs/params logging to the model comparison.

categories.title: Clinical Analysis
categories.data_source: the honest-eval finding (LOSO deployability) + external UCI
categories.ollama_task: Draft a clinical-applicability rubric tying LOSO sensitivity to deployability thresholds.

categories.title: Responsible AI Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a Responsible-AI scorecard (the 5 pillars) mapped to the paper's evidence.

categories.title: Architecture Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft an AI-architecture comparison table (centralized/edge/cloud/federated/RAG) for EEG epilepsy.

categories.title: Gap Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Synthesize a gap-analysis table from the ⚠️ items across the repo + literature.

categories.title: Future Research Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a future-directions roadmap section.

categories.title: Comparative Matrix Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft comparison-matrix generators (model×model from results, dataset×dataset from DATA.md).

categories.title: Visual & Bibliometric Analysis
categories.ollama_task: Draft a PRISMA flow-diagram (mermaid) + keyword co-occurrence heatmap generator.
